shortDescription: Spacious 1-bedroom condo in Leslieville with open layout, balcony, and underground parking.
fullDescription: Welcome to 42 Carlaw Avenue, Unit 710 in the vibrant Leslieville neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area showcases original architectural details alongside tasteful modern updates. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. All 1 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. The finished lower level adds valuable living space with a recreation room, extra bathroom, and storage. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Spacious kitchen with marble backsplash and gas range
